items.title: A Perilous Train Ride Home in Pakistan on the Jaffer Express
items.summary: We witnessed crossfire while waiting for the Jaffer Express, a vital lifeline through Balochistan. For many, it’s the only way home.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.
